queries.question: List all research scientists and also display female laboratory technicians.
queries.sql:
SELECT Research_Scientists.name
FROM Research_Scientists
UNION
SELECT Laboratory_Technicians.name
FROM Laboratory_Technicians
WHERE Laboratory_Technicians.Gender = "Female"

queries.question: Can you show female research scientists and female laboratory technicians?
queries.sql:
SELECT Research_Scientists.name
FROM Research_Scientists
WHERE Research_Scientists.Gender = "Female"
UNION
SELECT Laboratory_Technicians.name
FROM Laboratory_Technicians
WHERE Laboratory_Technicians.Gender = "Female"

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display female laboratory technicians and research scientists.
